# Introduction {.unnumbered}

Welcome to the **TUM IT System Administrator Reference Guide**. This comprehensive guide is designed for IT administrators at all departments, chairs, and organizational units of the Technical University of Munich, covering the central IT services provided by the IT Service Center (ITSZ) and the Leibniz Supercomputing Centre (LRZ).

## About This Guide

This reference book provides detailed information about:

- **TUM IT Organization**: Understanding the structure and role of central IT services at TUM
- **Administrator Responsibilities**: Roles, duties, and best practices for system administrators
- **User Management**: Managing users, groups, and access through TUMonline
- **Infrastructure Services**: Virtual servers, hosting, client management, and web services via LRZ
- **Network Services**: MWN, VPN, firewall, identity management, and certificates
- **Storage and Backup**: LRZ online storage (NAS) and data protection
- **Support Resources**: Contact information and consulting services

## TUM IT Overview

```{mermaid}
%%| fig-cap: "TUM IT Service Ecosystem"
flowchart TB
    subgraph TUM["Technical University of Munich"]
        CIO["CIO"]
        CIO --> ITSZ["IT Service Center (ITSZ)"]
        CIO --> DXO["Digital Transformation Office"]
    end
    LRZ["Leibniz Supercomputing Centre (LRZ)"]

    ITSZ --> |coordinates| Schools["All TUM Schools &<br/>Departments"]
    LRZ --> |provides infrastructure| Schools

    subgraph Services["Central IT Services"]
        S1["Email & Collaboration"]
        S2["Network & Identity"]
        S3["Servers & Storage"]
        S4["Client Management"]
    end

    ITSZ --> Services
    LRZ --> Services
```

## Target Audience

This guide is intended for:

| Role | Description |
|------|-------------|
| **IT Administrators** | Technical staff managing departmental IT infrastructure |
| **TUMonline Coordinators** | Administrators managing users and groups via TUMonline |
| **New Administrators** | Those newly appointed to IT administration roles |

## How to Use This Guide

1. **New Administrators**: Start with Chapter 1 (Organization) and Chapter 2 (Administrator Roles)
2. **Day-to-Day Operations**: Refer to Chapters 3-6 for specific service management
3. **Quick Reference**: Chapter 8 provides a handy quick reference card

## Key Resources

| Resource | URL |
|----------|-----|
| **TUM IT for Admins** | [www.it.tum.de/it/admins/](https://www.it.tum.de/it/admins/) |
| **TUMonline** | [campus.tum.de](https://campus.tum.de) |
| **LRZ Documentation** | [doku.lrz.de](https://doku.lrz.de) |

## Contact Information

::: {.callout-tip}
## TUM IT Support
- **Phone**: +49.89.289.17123
- **Email**: it-support@tum.de
- **Website**: [www.it.tum.de](https://www.it.tum.de)
- **Address**: Arcisstr. 21, 80333 München
:::
